channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: ArchLens Analysis - Mon May 25 16:16:04 UTC 2026
item.description:
ArchLens — instant architecture visualization for Java projects, right inside IntelliJ IDEA. Click Analyze in the ArchLens sidebar to scan your project. ArchLens...
vendor: ArchLens downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.getarchlens

item.title: Cucumber for Python - Tue Jun 02 21:27:33 UTC 2026
item.description:
Cucumber for Python — full behave support for Gherkin features in IntelliJ IDEA: Resolve & navigate Gherkin steps to their @given/@when/@then Python step...
vendor: Maxime HAMM downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.nimbly.cucumber.python

item.title: MybatisLogFormatSQL - Tue Jun 02 19:32:45 UTC 2026
item.description:
MybatisLogFormatSQL formats MyBatis log output into executable SQL. Select MyBatis log text in any editor, right-click, and choose MybatisLogFormatSQL to see the SQL...
vendor: aladinsws downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.aladinsws.plugins

item.title: LID - Linked-Intent Development - Tue Jun 02 00:27:39 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: lid-tools downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.lid

item.title: Chicken - Sat May 30 21:32:46 UTC 2026
item.description:
JetBrains language support for the Chicken esoteric programming language. Provides .chicken file recognition, syntax highlighting, and a bundled Chicken runner.
vendor: Olivér Raisz downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.oraisz.chicken

item.title: IOSP Analyzer for Python - Tue Jun 02 17:08:16 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: CCD Akademie GmbH downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: de.ccdakademie.iospanalyzer.python

item.description:
